Harlow [Name] 👋 ! Good news share with you ! 

🚆 MRT • TRX • FREEHOLD
Got one new launch at Cochrane side, beside MyTown / IKEA.

✅ 0% DownPayment
✅ Partial Furnished
✅ Walk to MRT Cochrane
✅ 1 stop to TRX
✅ Freehold

Quite interesting if you’re looking around KL city.

Hi [Name] 😊

Just saw a new freehold launch at Cochrane (beside MyTown & IKEA) — thought of you since you look around KL.

🚇 Walk to MRT Cochrane
🏙️ 1 stop to TRX
💸 0% downpayment
🛋️ Partially furnished
🔑 Freehold

Want me to send you more?

Hey [Name] 👋

New launch just dropped beside MyTown / IKEA in Cochrane — and it’s freehold 🔑

• MRT Cochrane at your doorstep
• 1 stop to TRX, 2 to Bukit Bintang
• 0% downpayment, partial furnished

Good for own stay or investment. Interested to know more?

Why I think this one can look:

This is last Freehold in this area liaw.
Plus the location is quite convenient:

📍 Walk to MRT Cochrane
📍 Beside MyTown & IKEA
📍 1 stop to TRX
📍 2 stops to Bukit Bintang
📍 Easy access to KLCC / Velocity

For own stay, convenient.
For investment, tenant pool should be strong because of MRT + TRX.

Quick reason why this one is worth a look:

It’s the last freehold left around here.
And the connectivity is 🔥
📍 Walk to MRT Cochrane
📍 Beside MyTown & IKEA
📍 1 stop TRX, 2 stops Bukit Bintang
📍 Easy to KLCC / Velocity

Own stay = super convenient. Invest = strong tenant pool (MRT + TRX).

Why I rate this one:

Last freehold in the area, and location damn strategic:
📍 MRT Cochrane walking distance
📍 Next to MyTown & IKEA
📍 1 stop to TRX
📍 Easy KLCC / Bukit Bintang / Velocity

Stay or rent both also can — tenant demand strong here.
